lesson.menu_title: Your World in Numbers -- Prices, Dates, and Small Talk with Clients
lesson.menu_desc: Reading + numbers, prices, dates and How much / How many -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Your World in Numbers -- Prices, Dates, and Small Talk with Clients
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 4 -- Your World in Numbers
phases: The Code (How much / How many + There is/are)

reading.rtitle: A Call About Prices and Dates
paras: It is Tuesday, July 8. Maísa has a call with a client, David. First, they make small talk. "How are you today? How is the weather in Rio?" David is happy to talk.
Then they talk about numbers. David asks: "How much is the new report?" Maísa answers: "The price is 2,500 reais. But there is a discount of 10 percent for you. So the final price is 2,250 reais."
David likes the number. "That is not expensive. It is a good price," he says. Maísa adds: "There are two payment dates: July 15 and August 15."
"How many reports are there this year?" David asks. "There are four reports, one every three months," Maísa says. "Perfect. Thank you very much. Have a great day!"

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa and David only talk about the weather and never mention numbers.
Maísa gives David the price and a discount, and they agree on the payment dates and the number of reports.
David is angry because the report is too expensive.

items: The report has a discount of 10 percent for David.
Maísa says there is a discount of 10 percent, so the final price is 2,250 reais.
David thinks the price is very expensive.
David says: "That is not expensive. It is a good price."
There are two payment dates: July 15 and August 15.
Maísa says there are two payment dates in the text.
There are ten reports this year.
There are four reports, one every three months.

listenings.text: Hello, this is David. I have some numbers for you. The price of the new report is two thousand five hundred reais. But there is a discount of ten percent, so the final price is two thousand two hundred fifty reais. There are two payment dates: July fifteen and August fifteen. How many reports do you want this year? We have four reports, one every three months. Please call me back. Thank you, and have a great day!

Good morning, everyone. This is Sarah. I have news about our budget. This year, our budget is one hundred thousand reais. That is a good number for the team. Before our meeting, remember to make small talk with the client. Ask about the weather, and ask how they are. Small talk is important. Our next meeting is on Monday, July fourteen, at ten in the morning. There are six people in the meeting. Please be on time. How much time do you need for your report? Tell me before Friday. Thank you!

extra_audio.text: Good morning. The price of the report is two thousand five hundred reais. There is a discount of ten percent. The final price is two thousand two hundred fifty reais. The payment date is July fifteen.
